name: send_message
description: Send an email, LinkedIn message, or WhatsApp message to a contact through the Lemlist inbox. This is for direct one-off messages outside of campaign sequences, useful for manual follow-ups or personalized outreach.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The email body content in HTML format.
parameters.example:
Hi John,

Just wanted to follow up on our chat last week...

parameters.name: fromEmail
parameters.description: The sender email address (must be a connected inbox).

body.subject: Quick follow-up on our conversation
body.body:
Hi John,

Just wanted to follow up on our chat last week...
